live.title: England vs Uruguay - 28 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: England face Uruguay in a heavyweight friendly clash featuring two nations with rich footballing history and contrasting styles. England will lean on their possession play, wide creativity, and home strength, while Uruguay bring their trademark intensity, compact defending, and dangerous counter‑attacks. With both sides using the fixture to measure their readiness, this meeting promises a tight, highly engaging contest. Tune in to catch all the action from the UEFA International Friendlies, LIVE only on Sony LIV.

Both teams view the friendly as a key test of balance and adaptability, setting the stage for a competitive encounter filled with tactical contrasts and high‑level execution. Tune in to catch all the action from the UEFA International Friendlies, LIVE only on Sony LIV.
